select_when: A plan sounds coherent internally but still needs an outside-view check, a pre-mortem, or a reference class before commitment.
The forecast is being carried by conviction, mission clarity, or proposer charisma more than by downside imagination and execution assumptions.
The team is preparing in detail, but that detail may be narrowing attention instead of improving realism about external events.
The next useful move is to expose underweighted downside paths before the current confidence hardens into commitment.
avoid_when: The group is using anti-optimism language to crush initiative even though the current question mainly needs execution discipline, not more downside narration.
The plan already has explicit outside-view checks, reversal conditions, and downside scenarios, so another bias warning would mostly repeat known information.

curation_notes.summary: Kept the model centered on outside-view correction, downside imagination, and anti-enthusiasm-as-evidence discipline rather than on generic pessimism.
donor_drops: Did not preserve donor motivation-language sprawl because the raw source is stronger on planning realism, outside-view checks, and underweighted downside exposure.
open_questions: The output type compresses a source that also spans grit, persuasion, and hypothesis-driven preparation.

select_when.note: The raw source is explicit on outside-view checks, pre-mortem logic, and cases where enthusiasm is being mistaken for evidence.

avoid_when.note: Both anti-activation conditions are grounded in source material that treats optimism as sometimes useful while still warning against false validation.

input_type.note: The source clearly activates on inside-view overconfidence and planning distortion, while the typed input remains a compact reviewed label.

output_type.note: The source yields a plan corrected by outside-view checks and downside imagination; the typed output compresses that result.

reasoning_types.note: Optimism-bias-and-planning-fallacy is strongest as probabilistic and reflective correction, while the taxonomy labels remain normalized.
